narrative:
Precinct Benton (precinct in Hocking County) has 498 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
